title: Backend: recent scrollback source + pane.send_keys + keys endpoint
action: Change read_pane to request herdr source 'recent' (was 'visible') so the screen carries recent scrollback. Add Herdr::send_keys(pane_id, &[String]); socket impl calls pane.send_keys {pane_id,keys}; fake impl appends the keys to the screen and bumps revision (enter -> newline). Add POST /api/panes/:pane/keys (screen::send_keys, body {keys:[...]}) wired in web/mod.rs, mirroring send_reply error handling. Add unit tests for fake send_keys and the endpoint.

truths: the keys endpoint validates auth and 404s an unknown pane like send_reply
prohibitions: Do not change the wire protocol number

trace.outcome: Backend: read_pane uses source recent; Herdr::send_keys + POST /api/panes/:pane/keys added with tests
trace.verify_output: 80 tests passed incl. send_keys_echoes_and_bumps_revision, send_keys_unknown_pane_errors, keys_land_and_bump_screen, keys_to_unknown_pane_is_404; clippy -D warnings clean
